title: torreyochloa pallida var. fernaldii
intro: Torreyochloa pallida var. fernaldii, also known as Fernald's spike-rush, is a variety of grass-like plant that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to North America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Fernald's spike-rush include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and soothe digestive issues. Fernald's spike-rush can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment for any health condition.
